provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, a biomechanical alien creature with an elongated eyeless head, inner jaw, tail with blade tip, no clothing at all just black chitinous exoskeleton dripping with slime, this is a Xenomorph from the Alien franchise not a member of any Star Freight civilization, copying existing IP not creating original design
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Biomechanical Xenomorph creature from the Alien franchise. No clothing, existing IP not original design. Wrong in every way.
